name: clinic managers in medical clinics processing 20–50 invoices/month tool
description: For clinic managers in medical clinics processing 20–50 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual tracking and reconciliation processes.

problem_solved: manual reconciliation of patient co-pay collections with billing records
features: manual entry of patient co-pay data
